text:
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY


















USER MANUAL FOR MERCHANDISE
(TRADING) SUPPLIER REGISTRATION

(ADD DELIVERY LOCATION)

Add Delivery Location

“Merchandise Supplier” refers to Supplier of Goods procured by Reliance Retail Ltd and its
Group / Associate Companies for Trading. Articles intended for in-house consumption in
Nature and Services are not supported by this Application.
Users are allowed to add delivery location once they receive their Login credentials post the
request get approved by respective category and commercial manager
Portal link - tips://supplierregistration.oil.com/
(Click Here)

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 1: Login Screen.
1.1. Log in to the portal with user id and password.
1.2. An Email with user id and link to create password is sent to user.

1.3. Once successful login, the following page will appear.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 2: Creating New Request.
2.1. Click on “Delivery Location” and after that click on “➕Add Delivery Location”.

2.2. Fill the form with the appropriate vendor details.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 3: Selecting Location Type
3.1. Select location type from the drop-down menu shown.
3.2. Always Select Location Type as Distributor.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 4: Selecting Product Category
4.1. Below screenshot shows the available vendor categories (Under which user is
registered) in the drop-down menu.
4.2. Choose appropriate vendor category from the product category drop down list.



4.3. Choose an appropriate Store format (Under which user is registered) from the drop
down menu.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.1. PAN is mandatory for each category.
5.2. PAN should be valid and should be in following validation.

1 Should be of 10 characters long
2 Initial 5 characters should be alphabets
3 4th character should be in [C P H F A T B L J G]
4 6th to 9th characters should be numeric
5 Last character should be alphabet

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5 Last character should be alphabet

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.3. Title filed value will be automatically taken from the fourth character of PAN. 
C - stands for Company
P - stands for Individual
H - stands for Hindu Undivided Family (HUF)
F - stands for Firm or Limited Liability Partnership
A - stands for Association of Persons (AOP)
T - stands for Trust
B - stands for Body of Individuals (BOI)
L - stands for Local Authority
J - stands for Artificial Juridical Person
G - stands for Government Agency

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.4.
In “NSDL PAN Name” field, type the name on the PAN card as maintained in
NSDL. Attach the PAN Document – Upload the scanned copy/E-Pan File of Vendor’s
PAN in psf or mpg format. Please declare the PAN name exactly as per PAN and ensure that “Y” flag is displayed in validation of
PAN name.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
Add Delivery Location
6 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY




5.5. Proof of Proprietorship – In case of Proprietorship Firm, wherein 4th Character of PAN is “P”,
and Vendor name/Bank account name is not the Proprietor’s name, Proof of proprietorship
document should be merged with copy of PAN and to be uploaded in PAN document section. List
of allowed supporting documents towards Proof of Proprietorship are hereunder:

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5.5. Proof of Proprietorship – In case of Proprietorship Firm, wherein 4th Character of PAN is “P”,
and Vendor name/Bank account name is not the Proprietor’s name, Proof of proprietorship
document should be merged with copy of PAN and to be uploaded in PAN document section. List
of allowed supporting documents towards Proof of Proprietorship are hereunder:
1. Shop & establishment certificate

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
1. Shop & establishment certificate
2. Confirmation letter from schedule Bank that Sh…. Is proprietor of M/s …. As per their
record. (RTGS mandate form is not valid here as Banks validate only signature and account no.
and do not give confirmation of other details)
3. Service tax registration certificate
4. IEC (Import export certificate) certificate
5. Trade License

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 5: PAN Details
5. Trade License
6. Any other certificate issued by any Govt./Local authority showing name of both firm and
proprietor
7. UDYAM Reg. certificate
8. GST Certificate

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.1.Basis the PAN and State code filled above, GSTIN for respective state will be fetched and plotted
in the field “GSTIN” for checking and editing (if required). If the vendor is having multiple GSTIN
for the same state, please ensure to Fill correct GSTIN no required duly supported by the GSTIN
copy.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.2. GSTIN number should belong to the respective state (From the address section). 6.3.If vendor is GST registered then user need to upload the scanned copy of GSTIN certificate in the document field. 6.4.If vendor is not registered with GST then user need to upload No GSTIN declaration form, you can download the template for the same from download section (On top navigation bar of same page) of the portal or (Click Here).

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
6.5.In case of Proprietorship Firm or Individual and if vendor is not registered with GST address proof document is also to be merged along with No GST declaration. List of supporting documents are hereunder: a. Water Bill b. Telephone (landline or postpaid mobile bill) c. Electricity bill d. Income Tax Assessment Order e. Election Commission Photo ID card f. Proof of Gas Connection g. Rent Agreement

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 6: GSTIN Details.
h. Passbook copy of Bank Account (First Page containing the Account Name, ac number, Address of account holder, etc.)

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 7: Contact Person Details.
7.1. User need to fill the details of contact person in this section. Reliance employee’s contact details
are prohibited

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.1. Fill UDYAM (MSME) related data in the following section.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
Add Delivery Location
8 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.2. Validation rules for UDYAM (MSME) number. Should be 16 characters long Format to input as “UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX” Initial 5 characters should be UDYAM Next two characters are exactly 2 alphabetic letters (A-Z) Next two characters are exactly 2 numeric digits (0-9) Next seven characters are exactly 7 numeric digits (0-9) Each part should be separated by hyphen ( - )

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.3.Refer UDYAM (MSME) certificate “Date of UDYAM registration” section and select correct date from the calendar option in “Date of issue” field 8.4.Validity Year - refer latest classification date in Enterprise Type of UDYAM certificate and add correct year from the calendar in “From” field”. In “to” field mention as “9999”. You may check the current status of UDYAM number from the portal through below menu option in following link

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
tips://udyamregistration.gov.in/Udyam_Verify.asp

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 8: MSME Details.
8.5. Upload the scanned copy of UDYAM (MSME) certificate in psf or mpg.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 9: FSSAI Details.
9.1. Fill FSSAI related data in the following section.
9.2. Validation rules are
FFSAI License Type
Select license type from the available options
FSSAI Number
14 digits numeric characters
Expiry Date
Enter the Expiry Date of FFSAI certificate
FSSAI Document
Upload the scanned copy of FSSAI certificate in psf/mpg format

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 9: FSSAI Details.
Add Delivery Location
9 | P a g e
STRICTLY FOR INTERNAL CIRCULATION ONLY




You may check the Active/Inactive status of FSSAI License from the portal link before entering the
details
tips://focus.fssai.gov.in/
Go to FBO search option

Type in the FSSAI number >> Enter catch>> Click on search

Detail will be displayed as below

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.1. Fill the correct bank details in this fields.

Account Number
Valid bank account number
IFSC Code
Valid IFSC code of the bank
Bank Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Branch Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Document Type
Select document type used to verify bank details
Bank Document
Upload the scanned copy of document selected in above option

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.1. Fill the correct bank details in this fields.

Account Number
Valid bank account number
IFSC Code
Valid IFSC code of the bank
Bank Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Branch Name
Automatically fetched from the IFSC
Document Type
Select document type used to verify bank details
Bank Document
Upload the scanned copy of document selected in above option

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 10: Bank Details
10.2. User can download the template of E-payment mandate form, from the download
section (On top navigation bar of same page) of the portal or Click Here.


Note: For registering a vendor Without Bank Details, please fill Dummy Account Number as 123 and
IFSC Code: IFSC0000123.

A. Add Delivery Location Process
Step 11: Submit the form
11.1. After filling all the required field click on submit button.
11.2. Request ID will be generated and displayed on Pop-up window. Please note the request ID for
future reference.

B. Steps to Check the Status of Vendor Registration.
Step 1: Click on the 'Status Report' tab, select 'Delivery Location' from the dropdown menu under
'Report Type', and then click 'Search.

metadata.section_title: B. Steps to Check the Status of Vendor Registration.
metadata.subsection_title: Step 1: Click on the 'Status Report' tab, select 'Delivery Location' from the dropdown menu under

Additional Information

1. Once requested id is generated TAT for the approval is 24 to 48 hours.
2. Contact us for any Login related / technical issue: rrsrportal@oil.com

User Manual for New Merchandise (Trading)
Vendor onboarding through
Supplier Registration Portal

Table of Contents

1.2. On right side panel of the page click on new supplier registration button as shown in above
screenshot.

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
2.1.In following page, fill all the basic details and upload the copy of PAN.

2.2.PAN should be valid and should be in following validation.

1 Should be of 10 characters long
2 Initial 5 characters should be alphabets
3 4th character should be in [C P H F A T B L J G]
4 6th to 9th characters should be numeric
5 Last character should be alphabet

validation of PAN name.

psf or mpg format.
2.5.Proof of Proprietorship – In case of Proprietorship Firm, wherein 4th Character of PAN is
“P”, and Vendor name/Bank account name is not the Proprietor’s name, Proof of
proprietorship document should be merged with copy of PAN and to be uploaded in PAN

are hereunder:

2. Confirmation letter from schedule Bank that Sh…. Is proprietor of M/s …. As per

and account no. and do not give confirmation of other details)

4. IEC (Import export certificate) certificate

and proprietor

Step 2: Supplier PAN details
New Merchandise Vendor Registration on Supplier Registration Portal
__________________________________________________________________________________

Page 3 of 8


2.6.If the supplier is Farmer then click on yes button, else click on No. Attach supporting
document to establish as Farmer

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
2.7. Fill UDYAM (MSME) related data in the following section.

2.8.Validation rules for UDYAM (MSME) number.








2.9. Refer UDYAM (MSME) certificate “Date of UDYAM registration” section and select
correct date from the calendar option in “Date of issue” field

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
2.9. Refer UDYAM (MSME) certificate “Date of UDYAM registration” section and select
correct date from the calendar option in “Date of issue” field

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
2.10. Validity Year - refer latest classification date in Enterprise Type of UDYAM certificate and add correct year from the calendar in “From” field”. In “to” field mention as “9999”. Should be 19 characters long Format to input as “UDYAM-XX-XX-XXXXXXX” Initial 5 characters should be UDYAM Next two characters are exactly 2 alphabetic letters (A-Z) represent state.

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
Next two characters are exactly 2 numeric digits (0-9) which represent district code within the state Next seven characters are exactly 7 numeric digits (0-9) unique code assigned to enterprise Each part should be separated by hyphen (-)

New Merchandise Vendor Registration on Supplier Registration Portal

You may check the current status of UDYAM number from the portal through below menu

Table of Contents
Step 2: Supplier PAN details
2.11. Upload the scanned copy of UDYAM (MSME) certificate in psf or mpg.
2.12. Once all the details are filled, click on next button.

Table of Contents
Step 3: Office Address Details
3.1. Fill the details related to Supplier Address (Registered Office Address) and click on next
button.

Table of Contents
Step 4: Contact Details
4.1. In this section supplier needs to provide contact information detail as shown

4.2 User needs to verify the mobile number by an OTP verification, for that enter mobile
number and click on Get OTP button as shown.
Note: Reliance employee’s contact details are prohibited

Table of Contents
Step 5: Select Product category and Format
5.1. Select the appropriate category and format in this section. Seek guidance from Reliance
Buyer with whom you are coordinating to choose the correct option.

5.2. Once category and format selected click on Add Product category button on the right side
(suppliers are allowed to choose more than one category and format).

metadata.subsection_title: Step 5: Select Product category and Format

text:
Table of Contents
Step 5: Select Product category and Format
5.2. Once category and format selected click on Add Product category button on the right side
(suppliers are allowed to choose more than one category and format).
5.3. The system will ask for FSSAI Details if applicable, as shown in below screenshot.
Supplier can add multiple FSSAI License details.

text:
Table of Contents
Step 6: Accept Terms and condition
6.1. Read the document related to terms and conditions and click on “I accept terms and
conditions” and Register button as shown.

Table of Contents
Step 7: Request ID Generation
7.1. Note the below request id assigned to you for future references.

A notification email will also flow to the registered email ID and Business for further
processing.

7.2 You may check your registration status (Business approval status) by clicking on the option
“Check Registration Status”

Table of Contents
Step 7: Request ID Generation
New Merchandise Vendor Registration on Supplier Registration Portal

7.3 Mention your PAN on the below window and click on Search tab to see the status.


Please ensure to check your registration status through this option before going ahead for any
fresh registration.

Table of Contents
Step 7: Request ID Generation
7.3 Mention your PAN on the below window and click on Search tab to see the status.


Please ensure to check your registration status through this option before going ahead for any
fresh registration.

Table of Contents
Step 7: Request ID Generation
7.4. Once the request is approved by category and commercial Managers, supplier will get
Login credentials in their registered email ID through an auto generated email

Click on the link provided in Activation Email and then set the Password and submit
